availableReplicas.description: availableReplicas defines the total number of available pods (ready for at least minReadySeconds) targeted by this shard.

replicas.description: replicas defines the total number of pods targeted by this shard.

shardID.description: shardID defines the identifier of the shard.

unavailableReplicas.description: unavailableReplicas defines the Total number of unavailable pods targeted by this shard.

updatedReplicas.description: updatedReplicas defines the total number of non-terminated pods targeted by this shard that have the desired spec.
